title: Air Handling Unit / RTU
summary: Built-up or packaged air handler / rooftop unit with cooling, heating, economizer and BAS control.
description: Preset commissioning template for air handling units and packaged rooftop units (RTUs). Covers fan, cooling, heating, economizer and safety functions.

questions.question_text: Unit set level on curb/pad with proper clearances for service and airflow
Supply, return and outside air ductwork connected and sealed
Condensate drain trapped, primed and piped to approved point
Filters installed, correct size/MERV, no gaps or bypass
Vibration isolation installed and shipping bolts removed
Power, disconnect and overcurrent protection per nameplate
BAS controller addressed and all points commanded/verified
Supply air, mixed air and space temperature sensors calibrated
Outside/return/exhaust dampers stroke fully and fail to safe position
Fan rotation correct; belts tensioned and aligned (if belt drive)
Refrigerant charge verified per manufacturer (packaged/RTU)
No abnormal noise or vibration at full speed
Amp draw within nameplate FLA on all motors

functionalTests.name: Fan Start / Stop & Status
functionalTests.description: Verify supply fan starts and stops on command with proven status.

rows.expected: Fan starts; status proven; airflow established
Fan stops; status clears

functionalTests.name: Supply Air Temperature Control (Cooling)
functionalTests.description: Verify cooling modulates to maintain supply air setpoint.

rows.step: Drive space/zone into a cooling call
rows.expected: Cooling stages/modulates on
SAT drives to and holds cooling setpoint
Cooling stages off

functionalTests.name: Heating Operation
functionalTests.description: Verify heating modulates to maintain setpoint.

rows.expected: Heating stages/modulates on
SAT drives to and holds heating setpoint
Heating stages off

functionalTests.name: Economizer / Outside Air Damper
functionalTests.description: Verify economizer and minimum OA operation.

rows.expected: Economizer modulates OA damper open for free cooling
OA damper returns to minimum position
Minimum outside air position maintained

functionalTests.name: Safeties
functionalTests.description: Verify freeze, smoke and high static shutdown.

rows.expected: Unit shuts down and alarms; requires reset per sequence
Unit shuts down and alarms
Supply fan limited/shut down and alarms
Unit runs to occupied setpoints; minimum OA active
Unit cycles to setback; OA damper closes

title: Terminal Unit (VAV / PIU)
summary: VAV or parallel/series fan-powered terminal unit with reheat and DDC control.
description: Preset commissioning template for VAV boxes and parallel/series powered induction units (PIU) with hydronic or electric reheat.

questions.question_text: Box installed level with access to controls and reheat coil
Inlet and discharge ductwork connected and sealed
Reheat coil piped and valved (HW) or wired (electric)
Series/parallel fan free to rotate (fan-powered units)
Controller addressed and online at BAS
Airflow (velocity) sensor reads and zeroes correctly
Damper actuator strokes full open to full closed
Space temperature sensor calibrated
Minimum and maximum airflow calibrated to design
Fan operation verified (fan-powered units)

rows.expected: Airflow drives to design maximum CFM
Airflow drives to design minimum CFM

functionalTests.name: Cooling Airflow Control
functionalTests.description: Verify cooling demand modulates primary air.

rows.expected: Primary airflow modulates up toward max
Airflow modulates back toward minimum
Airflow at heating minimum; reheat valve/stages energize
Discharge air temperature rises
Reheat de-energizes
Terminal fan starts and runs
Fan stops per sequence
Unit controls to occupied setpoints
Unit goes to setback; damper to minimum/closed

title: Air-Cooled Chiller
summary: Packaged air-cooled chiller with integral condenser fans and BAS control.
description: Preset commissioning template for packaged air-cooled chillers serving a chilled water system.

questions.question_text: Chiller set, leveled and isolated with clearance for condenser airflow and service
Chilled water piped, flushed and flow switch installed
Strainers installed and clean; air vented from CHW loop
Vibration isolation installed and shipping restraints removed
Power and overcurrent protection per nameplate (MCA/MOCP)
BAS communication established; setpoints and status verified
CHW supply/return sensors calibrated
Chilled water pump interlock proven before chiller enable
Factory/authorized startup completed and report provided
Refrigerant charge and oil levels verified
Phase rotation and voltage verified

functionalTests.name: Enable / Disable & Pump Interlock
functionalTests.description: Verify chiller enables only with flow proven.

rows.step: Enable chiller with CHW pump off
rows.expected: Chiller does NOT start; flow not proven

rows.step: Start CHW pump and enable chiller
rows.expected: Flow proven; chiller starts
Chiller stops; pump runs out per sequence
Compressor(s) load to hold CHW supply setpoint
LCHWT holds at setpoint within tolerance
Capacity stages/modulates up
Capacity stages/modulates down without short cycling

rows.step: Run at part load, mild ambient
rows.expected: Condenser fans stage to maintain head pressure
Additional condenser fans stage on

rows.step: Simulate loss of CHW flow during operation
rows.expected: Chiller shuts down on flow/freeze protection and alarms
Chiller faults and reports specific alarm to BAS
Alarm clears; chiller returns to normal

title: Centrifugal Chiller (Water-Cooled)
summary: Water-cooled centrifugal chiller with CHW/CW circuits, IGV/VFD capacity control and tower interlocks.
description: Preset commissioning template for water-cooled centrifugal chillers including pump and cooling tower interlocks.

questions.question_text: Chiller set, leveled and isolated on inertia base/isolators
Chilled and condenser water piped, flushed; flow switches installed
Strainers clean; loops vented; relief piped to safe location
Shipping restraints removed; rigging complete
Power and starter/VFD verified; phase rotation correct
BAS communication established; setpoints/status verified
CHW and CW sensors calibrated
Interlocks with CHWP, CWP and cooling tower proven
Factory startup completed; evacuation and charge verified
Oil heater energized for required duration prior to start
Megger / insulation test acceptable

functionalTests.name: Start Sequence & Interlocks
functionalTests.description: Verify staged start with pumps and tower.

rows.expected: CHWP and CWP start and prove flow; tower available
Chiller starts; guide vanes open from closed
Chiller stops; pumps run out; tower disabled per sequence
Capacity modulates to hold CHW supply setpoint
LCHWT holds at setpoint within tolerance
Inlet guide vanes / VFD increase capacity
Capacity reduces smoothly without surge
Chiller manages surge (hot gas bypass / vane control); no surge alarms
Chiller shuts down and alarms
Chiller shuts down and alarms
Chiller shuts down and alarms
Specific alarm reported to BAS
Alarm clears; chiller returns to normal

title: Cooling Tower
summary: Open or closed-circuit cooling tower with VFD fan, basin level control and freeze protection.
description: Preset commissioning template for cooling towers serving condenser water systems.

questions.question_text: Tower set, anchored and leveled with service clearance
Condenser water supply/return piped; basin makeup and overflow piped
Inlet screens, fill and drift eliminators in place and clean
Vibration isolation installed; rotating assembly free
Fan motor power and VFD verified; rotation correct
Basin heater and level controls wired and verified
BAS points (status, speed, level, temp) verified
Vibration cutout switch installed and wired
Basin filled; water treatment system online
Fan rotation and amp draw verified within nameplate

rows.expected: Fan starts; status proven at BAS
Fan stops; status clears

rows.step: Raise condenser water temperature above setpoint
rows.expected: Fan speed increases to hold setpoint
Fan speed decreases / fan cycles off
Makeup valve opens to restore level
Makeup valve closes
Basin heater energizes
Basin heater de-energizes
Fan shuts down and alarms; requires reset

title: Base-Mounted Pump (CHWP / CWP / HWP)
summary: End-suction or split-case base-mounted pump for chilled, condenser or hot water service, with VFD and lead/lag.
description: Preset commissioning template for base-mounted pumps. Suitable for chilled water (CHWP), condenser water (CWP) and hot water (HWP) service.

questions.question_text: Pump set on housekeeping pad; base grouted and anchored
Coupling alignment verified (flexible-coupled pumps)
Suction diffuser/strainer and triple-duty/check valve installed
Suction and discharge pressure gauges installed
Power and overcurrent protection per nameplate; rotation correct
VFD parameters set (if equipped); min/max speed verified
BAS status, speed command and flow/DP proving verified
Air vented; mechanical seal not leaking
Amp draw within nameplate FLA at design flow

functionalTests.name: Start / Stop & Status Proving
functionalTests.description: Verify control and proof of flow.

rows.expected: Pump starts; flow/DP proven at BAS
Pump stops; status clears
Pump speed increases to hold differential pressure setpoint
Pump speed decreases to hold setpoint
Lead pump runs; lag in standby
Lead/lag assignment swaps; even runtime maintained
Flow and DP within design tolerance

rows.step: Simulate lead pump failure (loss of status)
rows.expected: Standby pump starts automatically; alarm generated

title: Exhaust Fan
summary: Inline, roof or wall exhaust fan with backdraft damper and BAS interlock.
description: Preset commissioning template for general and dedicated exhaust fans.

questions.question_text: Fan mounted securely on curb/hangers with vibration isolation
Ductwork connected and sealed; backdraft/motorized damper installed
Shipping restraints removed; wheel free to rotate
Belts tensioned and aligned (belt-driven)
Power and disconnect per nameplate; rotation correct
BAS status point verified
Interlock/schedule wiring verified
Amp draw within nameplate FLA
No abnormal noise or vibration

rows.expected: Fan runs; status proven; backdraft damper opens
Fan stops; status clears; damper closes

rows.step: Place in auto and initiate schedule/interlock
rows.expected: Fan starts automatically
Fan stops automatically
Backdraft/motorized damper opens before/with airflow
Damper closes to prevent reverse flow
Airflow within design tolerance

title: Unit Heater
summary: Hydronic, steam, gas or electric unit heater with thermostat/BAS control.
description: Preset commissioning template for unit heaters serving mechanical, storage and similar spaces.

questions.question_text: Heater mounted securely at correct height/angle with clearances
Hydronic piped and valved / gas and flue connected / electric connected
Air vent and control valve installed (hydronic)
Fan guard in place; wheel free to rotate
Thermostat or space sensor installed and addressed
BAS point verified (if networked)
Control valve / stage strokes and fails safe
Fan rotation correct; amp draw within nameplate
No leaks at piping/valve connections

rows.expected: Fan energizes per sequence (after coil warm for hydronic)
Fan de-energizes per sequence (fan delay off)
Heating energizes; discharge air temperature rises
Heating de-energizes
Control valve opens / stages energize
Control valve closes / stages de-energize

rows.step: Simulate low space temperature in unoccupied mode
rows.expected: Heater runs to maintain low-limit setpoint

title: Boiler
summary: Hot water (or steam) boiler with modulating burner, BAS control and safety train.
description: Preset commissioning template for hot water heating boilers including staging and safety verification.

questions.question_text: Boiler set with required clearances; flue/venting connected
Hot water piped, flushed and vented; flow switch installed
Relief valve piped to safe location; expansion tank verified
Gas train/fuel piping connected and leak-tested
Power and overcurrent protection per nameplate
BAS communication established; setpoints/status verified
Supply/return sensors calibrated; outdoor air reset configured
Boiler pump interlock proven prior to firing
Combustion set up and report provided (CO/O2/efficiency)
Safety devices tested (low water cutoff, high limit, flame)

functionalTests.name: Enable & Pump Interlock
functionalTests.description: Verify boiler fires only with flow proven.

rows.step: Enable boiler with HW pump off
rows.expected: Boiler does NOT fire; flow not proven
Flow proven; boiler fires through ignition sequence
Burner fires to hold HW supply setpoint
Setpoint adjusts per outdoor air reset schedule
Firing rate modulates up
Firing rate modulates down without short cycling

rows.step: Increase plant load beyond lead capacity
rows.expected: Lag boiler stages on
Lag boiler stages off; runtime equalized
Burner locks out and alarms
Burner locks out and alarms
Burner locks out and alarms
Specific alarm reported to BAS
Alarm clears; boiler returns to normal

title: Split System AC Unit
summary: Ductless or ducted split system with indoor fan-coil and outdoor condensing unit.
description: Preset commissioning template for split system air conditioners (cooling or heat pump) serving IDF/electrical/tenant spaces.

questions.question_text: Indoor and outdoor units mounted securely with service clearance
Refrigerant line set installed, insulated and leak-tested
Condensate drain trapped and piped; float switch installed
Outdoor unit airflow unobstructed
Power and disconnects at indoor and outdoor units per nameplate
Interconnecting control wiring complete
Thermostat/controller installed and addressed
System evacuated; charge weighed-in per line length
Leak check passed; superheat/subcooling verified

rows.expected: Compressor and indoor fan start; supply air cools
Compressor stops; fan off per fan setting

rows.step: On a cooling call, observe outdoor unit
rows.expected: Compressor and condenser fan run; pressures normal
Indoor fan runs at each speed; airflow present at supply

rows.step: Pour water to drain pan / lift float switch
rows.expected: Drains freely; float switch interrupts cooling and/or alarms
Space temperature drives to and holds setpoint
